okr_summary.objective: Ship product integrations that unlock enterprise deals

key_decisions: SSO delivery pushed to Q2 due to security review dependency
Onboarding time target confirmed at 8 days by end of Q1
Engineering capacity locked -- no new projects until March
Sprint 12 velocity drop attributed to two engineers on leave
Onboarding time at 11 days -- intervention required
Onboarding improvement plan delivered -- time now at 9.5 days
Two critical bugs identified in payment module -- fix prioritised
SSO security review complete -- build begins Q2 Sprint 1

items.action: Confirm enterprise pipeline forecast with sales team
Initiate security review for SSO vendor
Review onboarding funnel and identify top three blockers
Schedule customer interviews for onboarding feedback
Patch critical payment bugs before Q1 close
Prepare Q1 pipeline report for board pack

material_variances.flag: Over budget by 8.8% -- pipeline growth driving spend
Over budget by 7.9% -- consistent with EMEA, pipeline-driven

cross_references.finding: Onboarding time target confirmed at 8 days by end of Q1 but current time is 9.5 days after intervention
Two critical bugs identified in payment module and 2 critical bugs open in metrics
Salesforce integration shipped on schedule and related OKRs at risk
Budget overrun in Sales department in both EMEA and NAMER regions despite overall under budget
Sprint velocity stable but drop in Sprint 12 due to resource leave

anomalies.description: Target was 8 days by end of Q1, currently at 9.5 days after intervention, indicating delay in improvement.
Two critical bugs remain open, prioritized for fix but still unresolved.
Two key objectives related to onboarding time reduction and product integrations are at risk despite progress.
Both EMEA and NAMER sales departments are over budget by approximately 8%, driven by pipeline growth.
Sprint 12 velocity dropped due to two engineers on leave, though overall velocity remains stable.

blockers.impact: No new projects can start until March, limiting ability to address additional initiatives.
SSO delivery pushed to Q2 due to security review dependency, delaying related integrations.

immediate_attention.reason: High severity issues impacting product stability and customer experience.
Current onboarding time exceeds target, risking customer satisfaction and OKR achievement.

immediate_attention.focus: Monitor and manage sales budget overruns
immediate_attention.reason: Sustained over budget spending in sales departments could impact overall financial health.
